food.description: A whole raw king crab presented on ice with shellfish and fresh herbs
Thinly sliced Spanish jamón with rich marbling served alongside olives and cheese.
Grilled asparagus spears with light charring served on a ceramic plate.
Fresh chives and leafy herbs growing in natural light near a window.
Two whole raw artichokes shown against a clean white background.
Fresh raw mussels opened to reveal their orange flesh, served with lemon.
Raw scallops resting in their shells on a bed of crushed ice.
Pan-seared scallops with a golden crust served in a light sauce.
Cooked mussels served in a pan with garlic, herbs, and lemon.
Fresh parsley leaves growing densely with bright green color and delicate stems.
White and yellow anemone flowers in bloom with soft petals and visible stamens.
Uncooked pasta shells with ridged texture shown in a close-up view.
Cooked pasta shells filled with sauce and herbs served in a dark bowl.
A basket of fresh, vibrant green Cheongyang chili peppers, characterized by their long, slender shape and glossy skin.
Skewered wavy fish cakes (eomuk) simmering in a clear, savory broth inside a gold-colored metal pot, garnished with sliced green scallions.
A pile of cylindrical white Korean rice cakes (garae-tteok) on a stone plate, accompanied by fresh green onions and a side of gochujang (red chili paste).
A spoonful of thick, deep red gochujang (fermented chili paste) being lifted from a white ceramic bowl, with dried chili flakes and fresh red peppers in the background.
A bowl of stir-fried Korean rice cakes (tteokbokki) coated in a thick, spicy red sauce, garnished with sesame seeds, sliced green onions, and served with a hard-boiled egg cut in half.

Rows of sliced kimbap (Korean seaweed rice rolls) neatly arranged on a plate, filled with colorful ingredients like carrots, yellow pickled radish, and egg, topped with a sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds.

A close-up of sliced Soondae (Korean blood sausage) stacked on a white plate, showing the dark, rich filling of glass noodles and barley, served with traditional side dishes like kkakdugi in the background.
Golden-brown, crispy fried squid rings seasoned with chili flakes and fresh herbs, served with a lemon wedge.

people.description: A person seated indoors against a brick wall, wearing a dark shirt and looking toward the camera.
